message:
chore(cargo): refresh Cargo.lock (sqlmodel 0.2.1 → 0.2.2, transitive windows-sys shifts)

Minor lockfile drift from a routine cargo update on the sqlmodel
family (sqlmodel, sqlmodel-core, sqlmodel-query, sqlmodel-schema,
sqlmodel-session, sqlmodel-pool, sqlmodel-frankensqlite,
sqlmodel-sqlite, sqlmodel-macros all 0.2.1 → 0.2.2). Cargo.toml
specifiers remain "0.2.1" so the resolution is within the semver
range.

The move also shuffles windows-sys between 0.61.2 / 0.60.2 / 0.59.0
for transitive deps (anstyle/anstyle-query, dirs-sys, getrandom,
notify, etc.) as the resolver picked different minor-version trees.
No direct dependency changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
